Key updates include an F-18 flyover planned over NYC, a lawsuit against Staten Island Dunkin’ Donuts for worker rights violations, and the start of a major subway car overhaul by the MTA, alongside significant developments in local housing and community issues.

### Risks & Alerts

- F-18 flyover planned over NYC area on Monday morning. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- City files suit against 21 Staten Island Dunkin’ Donuts shops over worker rights violations.
